summary: Iteration 47: All pricing animations, custom quote bar, quote API, and regression tests passed. PRICING: Section visible with 'INVESTMENT' label, 2 plan cards with hover effects, highlighted card has price-glow-ring (rotating conic gradient) and price-badge-pulse animations. Custom Quote Bar visible with icon, text, and dual CTAs. QUOTE API: Triple-connected - creates quote_request, lead, and timeline_event in MongoDB. HERO: 3 CTAs working (Beratung starten, Termin buchen, Leistungen). SERVICES: Cards have hover animations with translateY. CONTACT: Dual CTAs present. All regressions passed.

minor.issue: Does not include timeline events - separate /api/admin/timeline endpoint exists

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 test checked wrong endpoint for timeline)

seed_data_creation: Created test quote requests and leads via /api/quote/request during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Pricing section has INVESTMENT label, 2 plan cards with CSS animations (price-glow-ring rotating conic gradient, price-badge-pulse pulsing box-shadow), hover effects with translateY and border glow. 2) Custom Quote Bar below pricing with icon, text, 'Individuell anfragen' (opens chat with pre-filled quote message) and 'Beratung buchen' (opens booking modal). 3) Quote API POST /api/quote/request is triple-connected: stores in quote_requests + creates/updates lead + creates timeline_event. 4) Hero has 3 CTAs including direct booking. 5) Services cards and bundle cards have hover animations. 6) Contact section has dual CTAs.

PRICING_1_Section_Visible.details: Pricing section found with 'INVESTMENT' label, 2 main plan cards (Starter AI Agenten AG 499€, Growth AI Agenten AG 1.299€)

PRICING_2_Animations.details: Highlighted card has price-glow-ring element (conic gradient rotating via price-glow-spin animation), price-badge with 'EMPFOHLEN' text and price-badge-pulse animation

PRICING_3_Hover_Effects.details: Price cards have CSS transition (0.4s cubic-bezier) with translateY(-6px) and border glow on hover

PRICING_4_Custom_Quote_Bar.details: Custom Quote Bar visible with icon, 'Individuelles Angebot' title, description text, and two CTAs

PRICING_5_Individuell_Anfragen.details: Click 'Individuell anfragen' opens chat with pre-filled message: 'Ich benötige eine individuelle Lösung — bitte erstellen Sie mir ein maßgeschneidertes Angebot'

PRICING_6_Beratung_Buchen.details: Click 'Beratung buchen' on quote bar opens booking modal directly

HERO_1_Three_CTAs.details: Hero section has 3 CTAs: 'Beratung starten' (chat), 'Termin buchen' (booking), 'Leistungen' (anchor link)

HERO_2_Direct_Booking.details: Click 'Termin buchen' in hero opens booking modal directly

SERVICES_1_Card_Hover.details: 12 service cards found with hover animation (translateY(-4px), border glow, box-shadow)

SERVICES_2_Bundle_Hover.details: 3 bundle cards found with hover animation (translateY(-6px), border glow)

QUOTE_API_2_Creates_Lead.details: Quote request creates lead in MongoDB with 'angebot_angefragt' tag, verified via /api/admin/leads

QUOTE_API_3_Timeline_Event.details: Timeline events created in timeline_events collection (verified via MongoDB query - 5 quote_request events found)

QUOTE_API_4_Duplicate_Email.details: Duplicate email updates existing lead instead of creating new one - same lead_id returned

CONTACT_1_Dual_CTAs.details: Contact section has dual CTAs in .contact-cta-group: 'Beratung starten' and 'Termin buchen'

REGRESSION_Chat.details: Chat opens, sends message, receives AI response about KI-Automation

REGRESSION_Admin_Login.details: Admin login via API works (verified in pytest), returns access_token
